title: Audit evidence before closure
description: Security-sensitive work is not closed until the decision, validation, and residual risk are recorded in reviewable evidence.
body: Use when a task changes access control, secret handling, input validation, dependency trust, or externally reachable behavior. Do not use to create verbose reports for harmless refactors. Actions: retain file/line evidence, test command output, denied-case observations, and explicit residual risk in the final report or handoff. Validation signals include reproducible commands, changed tests, and links to review artifacts or issue IDs. Risk boundary: missing evidence for a high-risk change is itself a blocker and should trigger human review.
